archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Neon Tech

visual_effects.grain_overlay: Apply a fixed absolute div covering the screen with pointer-events-none, mix-blend-overlay, opacity-[0.03] to 0.05 and a background-image of a noise texture. Essential for the Awwwards tactile feel.
visual_effects.neon_orbs: Use absolute positioned divs with w-[40vw] h-[40vw] rounded-full bg-[#C3FF34]/30 filter blur-[100px] md:blur-[140px] -z-10. Position one top-right, one bottom-left. Animate them slowly with Framer Motion (floating up/down).

header.style: Fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 glassmorphism py-4 border-b border-[#142073]/5
header.elements: Logo (Nuku Creative in Neue Montreal bold/black), Navigation Links in center, CTA Button (Dark Blue bg, white/neon text) on right.
header.interaction: Links hover state changes text color to #C3FF34 or adds an underline.

hero.layout: Min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center relative overflow-hidden px-6
hero.content: Headline: 'We build creative systems for modern brands' where 'systems' and 'modern' are wrapped in a <span> with The Seasons, italic, lighter weight. Subtext: short agency description.
hero.visuals: Generous whitespace. The blurred neon green orb should sit gently behind the text to give it an ethereal glow.

why_nuku.items: 4 points as minimalist bento cards. border border-[#142073]/10 p-10 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-md rounded-[2rem]. Hover adds subtle neon green drop shadow and darkens border.
why_nuku.content: Use simple Lucide icons for each point, colored #142073.

client_logos.implementation: Use react-fast-marquee. Content: generic tech/corporate SVG logos (e.g., using Lucide shapes or simple text icons). Opacity 40%, grayscale. Hover on a logo transitions it to 100% opacity and adds a neon tint.

portfolio_grid.layout: Staggered grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2). First item can have mt-0, second item mt-0 md:mt-24 to create the stagger.
portfolio_grid.interaction: Group hover on project card: image scales up slightly (scale-105 duration-700). Overlay with #142073/20 appears. A standard round button 'View Case' fades in at the center. Do NOT use custom mouse follower as per user request (Keep animations simpler).

about.layout: Two columns. Left: Massive typographic quote in The Seasons italic. Right: Agency description and the studio image.

cta_section.layout: Relative overflow-hidden rounded-[3rem] mx-6 md:mx-12 my-24 p-12 md:p-24 text-center border border-[#142073]/10
cta_section.background: Use a complex background that combines #142073 (Dark Navy) with huge overlapping radial blurs of #C3FF34 (Neon Green). Add a noise overlay specifically over this section. The section text here should be white.
cta_section.form: Minimalist inputs inline or stacked. border-b border-white/30 bg-transparent text-white focus:border-[#C3FF34] focus:outline-none placeholder:text-white/50. Submit button: Solid #C3FF34 with #142073 text. On submit, hide form and show a beautifully styled success message (No backend integration).

animation_guidelines.general: Smooth, elegant, and understated. Avoid frantic movements. No mouse-follow effects per requirements.
animation_guidelines.scroll: Implement Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling if possible. Essential for the premium Awwwards feel.
animation_guidelines.reveal: Use framer-motion. Elements should fade in and translate up (y: 30 to 0) with a spring transition (stiffness: 100, damping: 20) as they enter the viewport.
animation_guidelines.hover: Interactive elements should have transition duration of 300-500ms. Keep hover states confined to CSS or simple framer-motion variants.

testing_requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="contact-form-submit-button"').
